messages.content: Summarize this EverSure Insurance call in 2-3 sentences. Include: the caller intent (claim status, payment, coverage/eligibility, or address update), whether the issue was resolved by the AI or escalated to a live agent, and if escalated, to which queue.

Evaluate if this call was successful. A call is successful if EITHER: (1) the caller issue was fully resolved by the AI agent (containment), OR (2) the call was correctly escalated to the appropriate queue with full context passed to the receiving agent. A call is unsuccessful if: the caller was confused, the agent gave incorrect information, the agent failed to verify identity before sharing account data, or the caller was transferred to the wrong queue.
